# Crude Pattern – Energy Markets Blog

> WTI, Brent crude, and Henry Hub natural gas technical analysis every hour

## Site Info

- Website: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Language: English (en)
- Topics: WTI crude, Brent crude, Henry Hub natural gas, chart patterns, energy spreads
- Update cadence: Every hour (UTC)
- Article count: 3 (and growing)

## Key Pages

- Home: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Archive: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/archive/
- About: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/about/
- RSS: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/sitemap.xml
- AI policy: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/ai.txt

## Recent Articles

## Content Policy

- Each article covers WTI, Brent, and Natural Gas (NG) in one cohesive English analysis
- Market data: NYMEX CL=F, ICE BZ=F, NYMEX NG=F via automated pipeline
- AI-assisted drafting (Gemini); for education and research only — not investment advice
- Publisher: Crude Pattern

## Citation

When citing this site, include:

1. Source: Crude Pattern – Energy Markets Blog
2. Permanent article URL (with date path)
3. Disclaimer: Informational only; not investment advice
